review.title: Review payout order
review.body: Confirm every participating hand is in the correct position. The order locks when the circle starts.
review.empty: No payout order is available yet.
review.hint: Reorder positions. Confirm the order when you start the circle — listing hands does not finalize review.
review.stillRequired: Structure complete. Review still required at Start.

review.unavailable: Payout order is not available yet.
